---
title: "Mandat CIUSSS de l'Est-de-l'Île-de-Montréal"
description: "Du 2026-03-01 au 2026-07-01"
sender:
  name: "Opubliq"
  email: "info@opubliq.com"
  address:
    street: "2-1040 av. de Bourlamaque"
    zip: "G1R 2P2"
    city: "Québec"
    country: "Canada"
  exempted: "Exempté de TPS/TVQ en tant que petit fournisseur."
invoice:
  number: "2026-001"
  issued: "2026-03-02"
  due: "2026-03-12"
recipient:
  name: "Médaillon Groupe Conseils"
#  address:
#    street: "[Client Street Address]"
#    zip: "[Client Postal Code]"
#    city: "[Client City]"
#    state: "[Client State/Province]"
#    country: "[Client Country]"
format:
  typst:
    template: "template.typ"
lang: "en_CA"
region: "CA"
papersize: "a4"
margin:
  x: "2.5cm"
  y: "2.5cm"
mainfont: "Alegreya Sans"
brand:
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Alegreya Sans
        source: google
        weight: [400, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
    base:
      family: "Alegreya Sans"
      size: 12pt
    headings:
      color: "#0d8491"
---

```{=typst}
#table(
  columns: (1fr, auto),
  rows: 36pt,
  fill: (col, row) => if row == 0 { luma(240) } else { white },
  inset: 5pt,
  align: right,
  stroke: none,

  // Header
  [*Description*], [*Montant (CAD)*],

  // Example rows - replace with your actual work
  [Services de recherche et sondage – Projet CIUSS Est-de-Montréal], [\$15 000.00]

  // Total row
//  [], [[Total Hours]], [*TOTAL*], [*\$[Total Amount].00*]
)
```

50% payable le 12 mars 2026. 50% payable le 12 juin 2026.
